title: PeopleSoft Administrator (App Security admin)
description:
About the job

My client in public sector is looking for PeopleSoft administrator to join their team.

Your new company

As a PeopleSoft administrator, you will lead technical administration, operational support, and continuous improvement for enterprise applications including PeopleSoft.

Your new role

  • Resolve performance issues, apply upgrades, and maintain high system availability and stability.
  • Safeguard applications through security assessments and remediation using enterprise-grade testing and protection tools.
  • Partner with cross-functional teams to deliver business-focused system enhancements and implementation solutions.
  • Manage vendors and oversee outsourced IT project lifecycles from requirements through implementation.
  • Lead user testing, training, and post-deployment feedback to drive adoption and experience improvements.

What you need

  • 5+ years administering PeopleSoft System, including installations, upgrades, and security architecture management effectively.
  • Proficient with application security and performance testing tools, supported by preferred certifications like CEH qualification.
  • Experienced with cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS and other enterprise system administration tasks.
  • Strong understanding of software development lifecycles and structured methodologies including Agile, Waterfall, and governance frameworks.

What you'll get in return

In return, you'll be part of an organization that values its employees. You’ll be rewarded with:

  • Structured career growth and plenty of developmental opportunities
  • Stable working environment

What you need to do now

If you're interested in this role, click 'apply now' or for more information and a confidential discussion on this role or to find out about more opportunities in Technology contact Yuki Cheung or email yuki.cheung@hays.com.sg. Referrals are welcome.

At Hays, we value diversity and are passionate about placing people in a role where they can flourish and succeed. We actively encourage people from diverse background to apply.

EA Reg Number: R22110258 | EA License Number: 07C3924 | Company Registration No: 200609504D
